title: Gateway API Lab 4/4 — Traefik Middlewares via ExtensionRef
description: Extend your HTTPRoute with vendor-specific functionality by attaching Traefik Middleware CRDs via the Gateway API ExtensionRef filter. Add rate limiting and security headers to protect the bookstore API. Traefik, Gateway, and a working HTTPRoute are pre-installed.

steps.title: Attach middlewares to an HTTPRoute via ExtensionRef
Verify security headers and test rate limiting
